  "site_title" => "Travel Steps Asia"
  "site_desc" => """
    Travel steps - Tour packages \r\n
    \r\n
    Travel steps is your one-stop destination for discovering and booking the best tour packages from trusted travel companies across the globe. Designed as a comprehensive tour package listing platform, we bring together a diverse range of travel providers, offering experiences that cater to every type of traveler—from adventure seekers to leisure enthusiasts.\r\n
    \r\n
    Whether you're looking for cultural explorations, scenic getaways, or custom-tailored journeys, My Travel Book connects you with verified tour operators, ensuring hassle-free bookings and unforgettable experiences. With an easy-to-navigate interface, detailed package descriptions, and customer reviews, planning your next trip has never been easier.\r\n
    \r\n
    Choose My Travel Book to explore, compare, and book your dream vacation today!
